LBL_GLOBAL_EMOJI_DESC:
🌍 **Global Emoji Management**
Here you can modify the bot's central default sets. Any changes will affect all servers!
HELP_EMOJI_DESC:
**Format:** `Emoji | Button Text | List Header | Limit | Flags` 

**Field Explanation:**
• **Button**: This appears on the physical button.
• **List**: This header appears above the names in the list.
• **Limit**: Max slots for this position (0 = infinite).

**Available Flags:**
`S` - **Show**: Show in the list? (Remove to hide category)
`P` - **Positive**: Count towards the total participant number?

**Styles (pick one):**
`B` - Button: Emoji + Text
`E` - Button: Emoji only
`T` - Button: Text only

**Colors (pick one):**
`G` - Green (Success)
`R` - Red (Danger)
`B` - Blue (Primary)
`Y` - Gray (Secondary)
